title: Large Roman Numerals
description: This resource pack adds all the missing Roman Numerals up to 255, which is the highest possible using commands in the vanilla game.
body:
The base game only provides Roman Numerals for enchantments up to 10 and potion effects up to 6. Higher level enchantments or effects are available using commands, however these display as "Levitation potion.potency.8" or "Protection enchantment.level.42".

This resource pack adds all the missing Roman Numerals up to 255, which is the highest possible using commands in the vanilla game.
